columns.name: PARTINR
columns.description: Unique number identifying the party involved in the transaction

columns.name: PARTI_TYPE
columns.description: Type of party involved (e.g., customer, supplier)

columns.name: KASSENR
columns.description: Unique number identifying the cashier or terminal involved in the transaction

columns.name: FACKNR
columns.description: Number of the cashier station (terminal) involved in the transaction

columns.name: VEKT
columns.description: Weight of the item or batch being transacted

columns.name: BRUKERID
columns.description: Unique identifier of the user who performed the transaction
